name: KIR_locus_chr19
description: Killer-cell immunoglobulin-like receptor (KIR) gene cluster on chr19q13.42, within the leukocyte receptor complex (LRC). Approximately 100-200 kb depending on haplotype: contains 14-15 KIR genes (KIR2DL1-5, KIR2DS1-5, KIR3DL1-3, KIR3DS1, KIR2DP1, KIR3DP1) with intra-cluster identity 85-99%. Gene content varies between haplotypes (A vs B haplotypes), and within haplotype each KIR allele can also vary. Mapping requires both PSV-aware paralog disambiguation and haplotype-aware copy-number handling.
expected_copy_count: haplotype-specific gene content; A haplotypes carry 7 KIR genes, B haplotypes carry 8-13. Two pseudogenes (KIR2DP1, KIR3DP1) are fixed framework markers
